DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joshua Ezrin, 415.577.2558 of Ezrin Law appearing in person for Plaintiff Mariya Lyublina.
Shukry Azar, 650.922.7341 Defendant in Pro Per appearing via Zoom.

Hearing held. The Court rules as follow: DEFENDANT SHUKRY AZAR DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 30 days to answer. Complaint properly states causes of action and is not uncertain. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joshua Ezrin, 415.577.2558, of Ezrin Law appearing for Defendants Claudio Bluer, Mariya Lyublina and Jasmin Castillo.Naifeh Azar, 650.291.0512 Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing via Zoom.

Argued. The Defendant requests 30 days to answer. Mr. Erzrin does not object. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDNTS NAIFEH AZAR AND SHIBLI AZAR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 30 days to answer. Complaint properly states causes of action and is not uncertain. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-15-2022 Continued To Jul-21-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS NAIFEH AZAR AND SHIBLI AZAR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

is continued to July 21, 2022 on Court's own motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not Reported (D501)
